scheme.launched_by: Government of India / State Agriculture Department (conceptual scheme format based on agri-incubation models)
scheme.announced_in: Startup India / Agriculture Innovation & Incubation Framework
scheme.department: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare / State Agriculture Department
scheme.department_address: Krishi Bhavan, New Delhi / Respective State Agriculture Office
scheme.active_beneficiaries_as_of_april_2026: approx 5–10 lakh farmers & rural service providers (projected model)

objective.primary: To create a network of trained agro service providers for supporting farmers with modern agricultural services
secondary: Improve access to farm machinery and technology in rural areas
Increase productivity through mechanization and advisory services
Promote rural entrepreneurship in agriculture sector
Support precision farming and digital agriculture adoption
Reduce dependency on informal/expensive farm services

financial_assistance.subsidy_support: Up to 40%–70% subsidy on agri-equipment purchase
financial_assistance.mode: DBT / Subsidy transfer to bank account

training_support: Skill development in drone farming & precision agriculture
Business management training for rural entrepreneurs
additional_benefits: Access to government farm machinery banks
Digital platform listing for service booking by farmers

residency.details: Must be a permanent resident of India (priority to rural applicants)

annual_income.note: Preference for economically weaker rural entrepreneurs

business_requirements.details: Must register as Agro Service Provider / FPO / SHG / Startup
business_requirements.bank_account: Individual or business account linked with Aadhaar/PAN
business_requirements.vehicle_or_equipment: Optional but subsidy available for purchase
